name: U.S. National Telecom, Inc.
summary: U.S. National Telecom, Inc. does not have significant operations. It focuses on various acquisitions in the real estate market through a combination of capital raises. The company was formerly known as Yi Wan Group, Inc. and changed its name to U.S. National Telecom, Inc. in September 2007. U.S. National Telecom was founded in 1999 and is based in Miami, Florida.
